response.step_by_step_log: I watched the entire video from 00:00 to 05:00. I analyzed the audio for any vocal components. The background audio is an instrumental track throughout the video. There are no vocal songs, so I did not perform any web searches for lyrics. I mapped the scenes based on the visual changes in the slideshow. All `contains_vocal_music` fields are set to `false`.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional slideshow for 'hololive English 3rd Concert - ALL.FOR.ONE' merchandise, featuring various product displays, event promotion graphics, and fan messages. The background audio throughout the video is a continuous instrumental track with no vocals.
